svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(30, 45, 255), rgb(138, 227, 227)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(0, 0, 51));
fill: light-dark(rgb(27, 161, 226), rgb(204, 229, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 110, 175), rgb(0, 0, 51));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 138, 0), rgb(230, 255, 204)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 255, 0), rgb(26, 51, 0));
fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 217, 213), rgb(255, 204, 204)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(174, 65, 50), rgb(51, 0, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 205px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 266px;
